readings.summary: Abraham meets the Lord, is promised a son.

readings.citation:
Ps 15:2-3, 3-4, 5
He who does justice will live in the presence of the Lord.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 15:2-3, 3-4, 5
He who does justice will live in the presence of the Lord.

readings.summary: Blessed are they who have kept the word with a generous heart and yield a harvest through perseverance.
Jesus eats at the home of Martha and Mary.

antiphons.text:
See, I have God for my help.
The Lord sustains my soul.
I will sacrifice to you with willing heart,
and praise your name, O Lord, for it is good.

Behold, I stand at the door and knock, says the Lord.
If anyone hears my voice and opens the door to me,
I will enter his house and dine with him, and he with me.
